text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sunny weather suddenly clouds over, and rain
starts pouring down soon after.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Man, what gives?! Why's it gotta be when I'm
running?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Just my luck. Guess that's all for me today, then.
choice_data_list: You should change into some dry clothes.
You should change into some dry clothes.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh, I'm fine. These won't take too long to dry
if I just leave them alone.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was just a coincidence! I'm not gonna get
a cold just from this.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So she says, but a few days later, Vodka isn't
looking so good.
